## Runtime

Which agent/runtime should the kit support or improve?

## Native Activation Model

How does this runtime load instructions, skills, memory, tools, or project rules?

## Verification Path

## Safety Notes

Any permission, credential, tool, MCP, plugin, or connector concerns?
